results.rendered_html:
dātṛ a. (trī f.) [dā-tṛc]
1 Giving
(pb) offering, granting, presenting, bestowing, imparting, &c.
2 Liberal.
— m. (tā)
1 A giver (in general);  Ku. 6. 1. 
2 A donor;  Bv. 1. 66. 
3 A lender, creditor.
4 A teacher.
5 A cutter.
